creator: lutz@iks-service.de
text:
Starting X11 with empty config does not load the "nv" driver at all. The reason is a missing symbol:
(EE) Failed to load /usr/local/lib/xorg/modules/drivers/nv_drv.so: /usr/local/lib/xorg/modules/drivers/nv_drv.so: Undefined symbol "miEmptyData"

Workaround: Use the "vesa" driver.
Unfortunately this driver does not support the wide screen resolutions needed.

Related components containing this symbol:
# fgrep -lR "miEmptyData" /usr/local/
/usr/local/lib/xorg/modules/drivers/r128_drv.so
/usr/local/lib/xorg/modules/drivers/openchrome_drv.so
/usr/local/lib/xorg/modules/drivers/nv_drv.so
/usr/local/lib/xorg/modules/drivers/mach64_drv.so

# pkg info xorg
xorg-7.7_1
Name           : xorg
Version        : 7.7_1
Installed on   : Mon Sep 22 08:36:44 CEST 2014
Origin         : x11/xorg
Architecture   : freebsd:10:x86:64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : x11
Maintainer     : x11@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : http://www.x.org/
Comment        : X.Org complete distribution metaport
Options        :
        DOCS           : on
Annotations    :
        repo_type      : binary
        repository     : FreeBSD
Flat size      : 0.00B
Description    :
This is a metaport for all the X.Org packages available in the ports tree.

# pkg info xf86-video-nv
xf86-video-nv-2.1.20_5
Name           : xf86-video-nv
Version        : 2.1.20_5
Installed on   : Mon Sep 22 08:36:14 CEST 2014
Origin         : x11-drivers/xf86-video-nv
Architecture   : freebsd:10:x86:64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : x11-drivers
Maintainer     : x11@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : http://www.x.org
Comment        : X.Org nv display driver
Shared Libs provided:
        nv_drv.so
Annotations    :
        repo_type      : binary
        repository     : FreeBSD
Flat size      : 225KiB
Description    :
This package contains the X.Org xf86-video-nv driver.

WWW: http://www.x.org
